notes: Installer now allows custom install locations (disabled by default with warning)
Improved image viewer particle effect options and fixed ZeroDivision crash affecting Bubbles
Fixed and restored 'Autoplay on startup' setting in Settings > General
• Added Shuffle Tracks + Album (5 shuffle modes total)
• Added Repeat All (4 repeat modes total)
• Repeat modes now modify shuffle behavior
• Super Shuffle + Repeat Off indexing fixed
• Shuffle Album + Repeat Off no longer repeats and stops correctly at queue end
